title: abies hickelii subsp. oaxacana
intro: Abies hickelii subsp. oaxacana, also known as Oaxaca fir, is a subspecies of evergreen tree in the pine family, native to Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oaxaca fir include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The herbal preparations of Oaxaca fir can be found in various forms, including essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
